pi_items.source: Confirmed against verifier.py expected_path and export_result.sh OUTPUT_PATH variable.
Confirmed against verifier.py logic where score is added if width >= min_width.
Confirmed against verifier.py logic where score is added if height >= min_height.
Confirmed against verifier.py logic where size check requires output file to be > min_size.

Task instructions mention loading files from countries, rivers, and cities folders. Verified by inspecting the install_gvsig.sh script which downloads the Natural Earth datasets into these directories.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real public domain Natural Earth datasets (110m physical and cultural shapefiles for countries, rivers, and cities). The required exported image is verified to be /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/africa_rivers_map.png. The verifier programmatically checks that the final PNG image is at least 400x400 pixels and 20480 bytes in size.
